Container.Name: dns-monitoring
Container.Overview: DNS Monitoring WebApp - Self-hosted DNS query monitoring and analytics. Multi-service deployment with nginx, backend API, and frontend UI.
Container.RunCmd:
# 1. Clone the repository cd /mnt/user/appdata/dns-monitoring git clone https://github.com/freemen810/dns-monitoring.git . 2>/dev/null || git -C . pull
# 2. Create required directories mkdir -p /mnt/user/appdata/dns-monitoring/data
# 3. Set proper permissions chmod 755 /mnt/user/appdata/dns-monitoring/data
# 4. Start with docker-compose (Unraid config with local builds) docker-compose -f docker-compose.unraid.yml up -d --build
# 5. Wait for services to be healthy sleep 10 docker-compose -f docker-compose.unraid.yml ps
Container.Description:
DNS Monitoring - Self-hosted DNS query monitoring and analytics web application.
This template uses docker-compose to build and deploy three services on your Unraid system: - Backend API (Express.js on port 3000) - Frontend UI (React/Vite) - Reverse Proxy (nginx on port 3000)
Installation: 1. Add this container via template 2. The RunCmd will automatically: - Clone the GitHub repository to /mnt/user/appdata/dns-monitoring - Create data directory with proper permissions - Build Docker images from source (backend, frontend) - Start all services with docker-compose - Services communicate on internal bridge network
Features: - Real-time DNS query monitoring and logging - React-based web dashboard - Express.js REST API - SQLite database for persistent storage - Query analytics and reporting - Configurable DNS servers - Multi-service Docker architecture
Architecture: - nginx (port 3000) → routes to backend API and frontend - backend (internal port 3000) → Node.js Express API - frontend (internal port 5173) → React/Vite app - All on dns-monitoring bridge network for inter-service communication
Access: - Web UI: http://[IP]:3000 - All services start automatically
Data: - Database: /mnt/user/appdata/dns-monitoring/data/dns-monitoring.db - Project files: /mnt/user/appdata/dns-monitoring - Persistent volumes: dns-data, nginx-cache
Troubleshooting: - Check logs: docker logs dns-monitoring-backend - Verify services: docker-compose -f docker-compose.unraid.yml ps - Restart: Stop container, then Start
GitHub: https://github.com/freemen810/dns-monitoring
